tree.name: Christian Koloko
tree.narrative: **Christian Koloko** was picked up off waivers in January 2026 on a two-way deal. The former Pac-12 Defensive Player of the Year out of Arizona is a reclamation project after health issues derailed his early career in Toronto.
tree.note: Cameroon center, Pac-12 DPOY at Arizona. Signed off waivers on two-way contract.
